lossItems.downstreamRisk: The bridge export does not carry OFARM-internal authority or review lineage into the external payload.
lossItems.mitigation: Retain publication traces, authority decisions, and evidence sufficiency records inside OFARM and bind the bridge payload back to them.

lossItems.ofarmTargetRef: advisory annotation and evidence note subset
lossItems.downstreamRisk: Some note formatting and local annotation nuance may narrow when leaving OFARM for the declared ADAPT bridge subset.
lossItems.mitigation: Preserve the OFARM source annotations and declare the approximation posture in the bridge trace.

notes: Illustrative managed-loss posture for the draft ADAPT export bridge subset.
